title: Milestone Camping 5-Litre Foot Operated Air Pump/Suitable For All Inflatables/Includes 2 Nozzles/Lightweight & Portable / 26.5cm x 18.5cm
features: FOOT OPERATED AIR PUMP - This nimble 5-litre foot pump will make blowing up inflatables like paddling pools, beach balls and airbeds at home or on holiday an absolute breeze!
INFLATE OR DEFLATE EASILY – The air pump features 2 separate chambers, one for inflating and one for deflating, ensuring the task in hand can be completed both quickly and efficiently.
INCLUDES 2 SEPARATE NOZZLES – The multi-purpose air pump comes complete with 2 interchangeable nozzles that ensure you will have every attachment required to blow up your inflatables.

PERFECT SIZE – The foot pump measures 26.5cm x 18.5cm (H x W), is super lightweight & portable, and folds down flat when not in use, making it easy to take from the car to the beach or festival grounds.
MILESTONE CAMPING – Milestone Camping is the leading manufacturer of everything you need to enjoy the great outdoors. Visit the Milestone Camping page on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: Product Description Powerful & Simple to Use Foot Operated Pump Inflate items anywhere you go using this Manual Foot Operated Air Pump. No electricity is needed as all air is pumped manually, so you can use it even when at the beach or camping in remote areas. As the pump folds flat when not in use, it's even more suited to portable use. Previous page 2 Separate Nozzles Two interchangeable nozzles are included, making the pump compatible with all sorts of valves. Inflate or Deflate The pump features two separate ports - one for inflating, and the other for deflating with ease. Manual Powered Pump No electricity is needed for this pump; it's all manually powered by stepping up & down to pump air. Designed for Travel The pump is lightweight, and folds flat when not in use for easy storage & transport. Next page 1 2 Separate Nozzles 2 Inflate or Deflate 3 Manual Powered Pump 4 Designed for Travel
